zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Hereford於1269年出生在英國史洛普爾阿其哈姆時，她的父親Robert de Hereford31歲，母親Johanna Brampton36歲。她於大約1290年與Sir Bryan de Brampton在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1298年在英國享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Hereford于1269年出生在英国史洛普爾阿其哈姆时，她的父亲Robert de Hereford31岁，母亲Johanna Brampton36岁。她于大约1290年与Sir Bryan de Brampton在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1298年在英国享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hereford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hertford (Hertfordshire) (in which the t was lost early, as in the modern pronunciation Harford), Hereford (Herefordshire), or Harford (Devon, Gloucestershire). The Devon and Herefordshire placenames derive from Old English here ‘army’ + ford ‘ford’, while the Gloucestershire and Hertfordshire placenames derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + ford.

variants.name: Herford
meanings: German: habitational name from a place of that name in Westphalia.

variants.name: Harford
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire): variant of   Hereford  .

variants.name: Havard
meanings: English and Welsh (Brecknockshire and Glamorgan): habitational name from Haverfordwest (Pembrokeshire), from Old English hæfer ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’.
English and Welsh (Brecknockshire and Glamorgan): in some cases, the name may also be a variant of   Hereford  .
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hahward, composed of the elements hah, which is unexplained, and ward ‘guard’.

variants.name: Hurford
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Hereford  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Hereford was born in 1269, in Atcham, Shropshire, England, her father, Robert de Hereford, was 31 and her mother, Johanna Brampton, was 36. She married Sir Bryan de Brampton about 1290, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1298, in England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Hereford est née en 1269, à Atcham, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Hereford, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Johanna Brampton, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Bryan de Brampton environ 1290, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1298, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Hereford 1269 in Atcham, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Hereford 31 und ihre Mutter Johanna Brampton 36. Sie hat um 1290 in Europa Sir Bryan de Brampton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1298 im Alter von 29 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Hereford è nata il nel 1269 nel Atcham, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Hereford, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Johanna Brampton, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir Bryan de Brampton circa 1290, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1298, nel England, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Herefordが1269年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアアトチャムで生まれた時，父Robert de Herefordは31歳，母Johanna Bramptonは36歳であった。約1290年にヨーロッパでSir Bryan de Bramptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1298年にイギリスで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Hereford(이)가 1269년 영국 슈럽실르 앳챔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Hereford(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Brampton(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1290년 우럽에서 Sir Bryan de Brampton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 영국에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Hereford nasceu em 1269, em Atcham, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Hereford, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Brampton, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Bryan de Brampton aproximadamente 1290, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1298, em Inglaterra, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Hereford родилась в 1269 г. в местности ачам, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Hereford было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Johanna Brampton, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Bryan de Brampton около 1290 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1298 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Hereford nació en 1269, en Atcham, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Hereford, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Johanna Brampton, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir Bryan de Brampton aproximadamente 1290, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1298, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años.
